name: @tn/sdk
description: TestigoNodo protocol SDK for TypeScript. Wraps tn-wasm (Rust) with idiomatic types.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test test/sdk_smoke.test.ts test/node_runtime.test.ts test/handlers.test.ts test/handlers_fs_drop.test.ts test/handlers_fs_scan.test.ts test/handlers_vault_push.test.ts test/handlers_vault_pull.test.ts test/init_idempotence.test.ts test/client.test.ts test/client_ephemeral.test.ts test/config_env_vars.test.ts test/multi_group_routing.test.ts test/tnpkg_export_absorb.test.ts test/tnpkg_interop.test.ts test/admin_cache.test.ts test/read_shape.test.ts test/agents_group.test.ts test/secure_read.test.ts test/admin_add_agent_runtime.test.ts test/agents_policy_published.test.ts test/secure_read_interop.test.ts test/sync_state.test.ts test/core_no_node_imports.test.ts test/errors_instanceof.test.ts
